preamble: Spontaneous diphthongization of 'a' (or its mid-vowel reflexes) into 'ue' is a characteristic development in the evolution of the Spanish language from Vulgar Latin.

examples.note: Diphthongization of stressed short vowels in the Romance family.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
